2026/05/20 17:04:39.899045346 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/20 17:04:39.899071485 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/20 17:04:39.899072387 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/20 17:04:39.899087415 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/20 17:04:39.899088246 if (!missing(fg))

2026/05/20 17:04:39.899332723 "default"))
